72.reason: [This prints the node even when it's not a leaf because the condition only skips recursive calls but still executes print for non-leaf nodes. The print statement should be inside an else block or guarded by isLeaf(p).]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.25 , reason:  [This prints the current node regardless of whether it's a leaf or not. The condition above only controls recursion, not printing. 110.reason: [The function name suggests in-order traversal, but the implementation is actually a modified pre-order that prints all nodes regardless of being leaf or not due to misplaced print statement. Moreover, the problem requires left-to-right leaf output which corresponds to in-order traversal of leaves, but current logic doesn't achieve that correctly.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.25 , reason:  [The traversal is not in-order (mid-order). The function visits root after checking if it's non-leaf, then recurses left and right, but prints every node unconditionally at the end. This leads to incorrect order and inclusion of non-leaves.]
